sessions.summary:
## Hard Constraints
- API Key configuration priority: frontend request parameters > .env configuration > default empty value
- .env file in backend directory contains ARK_API_KEY, KB_ID, KB_API_KEY which serve as default values when frontend parameters are not provided
- PostgreSQL must be started via Docker container; host machine does not require database environment installation
- Logs must include both short logs (for quick retrieval) and long logs (for detailed error information); long logs

[session_id: 6a44e6a21e4f71ba76cd6a98 | topic_summary_time: 2026-07-06 13:53:27]User inquired about work progress and testing status, noting potential system unresponsiveness. Assistant provided current progress: completed UI upgrade (tech style with Lucide icons, purple theme, glow animations, Orbitron font), created start.sh script, updated docker-compose.yml with PostgreSQL, and organized requirements docs into .ai-workflow/prd/. User needs to manually start Docker Desktop and run ./start.sh

[session_id: 6a4bc7078b64f409dc54852a | topic_summary_time: 2026-07-07 12:49:06]User requested troubleshooting why the knowledge base wasn't working, starting with a summary document. Initial issue was HTTP 403 signature errors due to missing 'V-Account-Id' header. After adding KB_ACCOUNT_ID to .env, further testing revealed the root cause: KB_API_KEY was in AK:SK format (for SignerV4) instead of the required Bearer Token format (sk-xxx) for OpenViking/knowledge base API.
